note: Iteration 8 (Amendment A5) — the workshop-visuals capability, designed via the per-lens workshop i7 shipped (dogfooded on 141 itself). Applicability broadened by the maintainer: the feature is a PER-LENS visual vocabulary, so the diagram-consuming lenses (security/data/architecture/devops/ui-ux) are in, each with its native diagram type; the foundational lenses shaped the build. Records the per-lens workshop decisions (SC-021 shape).

agenda: building blocks of the visuals capability
architecture-core.decision: Catalog data file (lens->diagram-type->render-form) + a deterministic emit helper + an intake-reference helper + a conduct-rule addition. Behavioral content (agent authors the mermaid/ASCII), deterministic emit (helper writes file + clickable link) — the i7 split.

component-design.decision: render/emit, intake-reference, and the catalog are separate units; emit reuses Format-SpecrewFileReference (FR-028 console-vs-persisted); index.yml stays pure (catalog is a sibling).

requirements-nfr.decision: Ephemeral temp under .specrew/workshop-visuals/ (gitignored, cleaned at iteration close); keepers are inline mermaid in design docs (versioned text); svg/html persisted as referenced files only when richer-than-mermaid; mermaid/ASCII are text (accessible); the emit helper is pure/LLM-free.

ui-ux.decision: Tiered render+surface (inline -> temp-file+file:/// link -> persisted; mermaid default, ASCII console, svg/html wireframes). Bidirectional per-lens intake: the Crew offers to plot the lens's diagram AND asks for an existing diagram/doc/Figma-export/whiteboard-photo (file:/// reference, transcribable to mermaid). The per-lens diagram vocabulary is the feature's core.

agenda: security diagram type for the vocabulary
security-compliance.decision: Trust boundaries + attack surface (mermaid flowchart with trust zones as subgraphs; entry points + data crossings).

agenda: data diagram type for the vocabulary
data-storage.decision: ERD for relational; for NoSQL, document relations as references by JSON-path of identities (mermaid erDiagram / a doc->doc graph).

agenda: devops diagram type for the vocabulary
devops-operations.decision: Deployment topology (environments, nodes, pipelines) as a mermaid flowchart/deployment diagram.

cross_cutting_diagram_types.flows: user actions + system actions as a mermaid sequenceDiagram
